environment_details.underlying_system: LibreHealth EHR (open-source electronic health records system)
environment_details.real_data_source: NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey) 2011-2012, from https://github.com/LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr/raw/master/sql/nhanes/libreehr_nhanes.sql.gz

privileged_info_summary: The task is designed to test an AI agent's ability to configure a procedure provider in LibreHealth EHR. All metadata values are synthetic test fixtures: the provider name (LabCorp Diagnostics), NPI (1234567893), facility/application IDs (LIBREEHR, CLINIC01, LABCORP, LC7890), hostname (sftp.labcorp-example.com), and protocol (DL) are all fictional values created for testing purposes. The underlying system runs real NHANES patient data (9,375 patients from the 2011-2012 National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey) imported into a LibreHealth EHR instance on MariaDB. The NPI value has an invalid Luhn check digit (actual digit is 3, but correct digit should be 5 for the base identifier 123456789). No real healthcare provider or laboratory configuration is involved.
